_comment: NON-OPERATIONAL PLACEHOLDER SAMPLE. This file intentionally contains NO genuine harmful AgentHarm instructions. Each record mirrors the real AgentHarm record schema (id, id_original, name, category, prompt, target_functions, grading_function) and preserves a real harm category, but the `prompt` text is redacted/sanitized and the `target_functions` are generic tool names. It exists so the AgentHarmAdapter and the harmful-action refusal-rate metric can be exercised without vendoring harmful content. To score real AgentHarm tasks, run: `ascore standard ingest agentharm --full` (fetches the public set from HuggingFace). See ATTRIBUTION.md.

behaviors.name: Placeholder harmful task (Fraud)
behaviors.prompt: [REDACTED PLACEHOLDER — a Fraud-category AgentHarm task. The real harmful instruction is intentionally NOT vendored. Run `ascore standard ingest agentharm --full` to fetch the public dataset.]
